topic: Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind

scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind ki ek mistake teri ₹30-50LPA ki Amazon offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Caching: Cache-Aside vs Write-Through vs Write-Behind solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
